title: Why Each Wrong Answer Is Tempting

distractors.whyTempting: SBP is an infection, and students default to broad empiric coverage
distractors.whyWrong: SBP is treated with cefotaxime (3rd-gen ceph), not broad-spectrum like meropenem

distractors.whyTempting: Paracentesis is essential for SBP diagnosis and students may want to repeat
distractors.whyWrong: Diagnosis is already established — PMN >250. Treatment should not be delayed for repeat tap
SBP is medical, not surgical — surgery is for secondary peritonitis with perforation

visual_contract.teaching_goal: Show why common SBP management errors occur and the cognitive traps behind them
